title: AssistantAI – Real-Time Conversation Hints and Screenshot Analysis
abstract:
AssistantAI is an experimental open-source project exploring real-time desktop AI.

It listens to a selected application, provides real-time conversation hints using a document as context, and also supports configurable screenshot analysis.

A short demo is available here:

Demo:
